h1.visual_description: Not present in sample, but inferred as chapter titles based on footer context.
h1.example_text: Public Aquariums and Their Role in Education, Science, and Conservation

h2.visual_description: Bold, white text on a dark charcoal/black rectangular background spanning the width of the associated element (table header style).
h2.example_text: Fish species on IUCN Red List

visual_matchers.pattern: Italicized text followed by a colon at the start of a block below an image or table.
Text wrapped around rectangular image assets in a two-column-like flow within a single-column master layout.
Scientific names in italics within parentheses or following common names.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number followed by a vertical pipe and the chapter/book title at the bottom of the page (e.g., '132 | Public Aquariums...')
